film.title: Manhattan Melodrama
film.overview: The friendship between two orphans endures even though they grow up on opposite sides of the law and fall in love with the same woman.

dialogues.dialogue: They haven't got a thing on me as long as you keep quiet.  You know, Blackie,  for a while I was almost ashamed of having loved you,  but I'm not now. I'm proud.  Yeah? Well, I think you're okay, too.

You're gonna nail me every time I step out of line and sock me to the limit.  - You said it. - And cockeyed as it all sounds,  I'll be proud of you. What'd you think of that?  Well, how about the Manny Arnold killing?  All right, I'll bite. What about it?
